data.title: OS floating latent window when app minimized (settings-gated)
data.from: user idea sparked by MPI-269 debug viewer; consumer of preview:frame bus

data.note: plan+checklist written; briefing gated with user; implementing float latent window

Build complete: 3 new files (floatLatentWindow.cjs, float-latent.html, floatLatentBridge.js) + main.js/shell.js/MpiSettings/state/storage wiring. Lint clean, resize+seq-drop logic self-checked. Desktop-only minimize-triggered feature — needs USER live-verify (local + remote both-engine). Not committed.
Float latent window shipped, local USER-VERIFIED (mauve, bottom-right, live latents, persists on 2nd gen, remembers size/pos, throttled). Remote/RunPod verify deferred by user — see validation.md.
